title: Fragment: To Byron.
content:
O mighty mind, in whose deep stream this age
    Shakes like a reed in the unheeding storm,
    Why dost thou curb not thine own sacred rage?
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Percy Bysshe Shelley delivers a powerful performance in "Fragment: To Byron."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
